# Computer-Use Agent API

> Run Computer-Use AI agents that see the screen and decide what to click, type, and scroll. Best when the work lives behind a user interface with no API to call. Built on H's Holo family of Vision Language Models: you describe a task in plain language, H provisions the environment, runs the agent, and returns the result through a lifecycle your app can monitor, steer, and stop.

## Get started

- [Computer-Use Agent](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/introduction.md): Run Computer-Use AI agents. Best when there's no API to call.
- [Quickstart](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/quickstart.md): Create your first agent session in under 5 minutes.
- [SDKs](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/integrations.md): Typed Python and TypeScript clients, plus the CLI.
- [MCP server](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/mcp.md): Run and manage H agents from any MCP host, no HTTP or SDK code.
- [Coding skills](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/coding-skills.md): Install the hai-agents skill so Claude Code, Cursor, and other assistants know the H APIs and help you build use cases.

## Agents

- [Agents](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/agents/overview.md): An agent is a reusable configuration that defines what an AI agent can do.
- [Multi-agent](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/multi-agent.md): Let one agent delegate to specialist subagents that run in parallel.
- [Create an agent](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/agents/create.md): Create a reusable agent in your own catalog.
- [List agents](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/agents/list.md): Discover available agents from your catalog and the H preset catalog.
- [Retrieve an agent](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/agents/retrieve.md): Get the full specification of a single agent.
- [Update an agent](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/agents/update.md): Replace the configuration of an agent in your catalog.
- [Delete an agent](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/agents/delete.md): Remove an agent from your catalog.

## Environments

- [Environments](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/environments/overview.md): The surfaces an agent perceives and acts upon.
- [Browser](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/environments/browser.md): The managed web browser an agent perceives and drives.
- [Create an environment](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/environments/create.md): Create a reusable environment in your own catalog.
- [List environments](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/environments/list.md): Discover available environments.
- [Retrieve an environment](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/environments/retrieve.md): Get the full specification of an environment.
- [Update an environment](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/environments/update.md): Replace the configuration of an environment in your catalog.
- [Delete an environment](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/environments/delete.md): Remove an environment from your catalog.

## Sessions

- [Sessions](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/sessions/overview.md): A session represents a single execution of an agent.
- [Observe and steer a session](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/observe-and-steer.md): Watch a run, intervene while it works, and keep the conversation going.
- [Custom tools](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/custom-tools.md): Extend the agent's toolbox with functions from your own code: the agent calls them, the SDK executes them, the run continues with the result.
- [Structured output](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/structured-output.md): Get the agent's final answer as typed, schema-validated data instead of free-form text.
- [Create a session](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/sessions/create.md): Launch a new agent run.
- [Get session status](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/sessions/status.md): Lightweight polling endpoint for session progress.
- [Get session changes](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/sessions/changes.md): Long-poll for real-time session updates.
- [List events](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/sessions/events.md): Paginated list of session events.
- [Cancel a session](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/sessions/cancel.md): Stop a running session.
- [Send messages](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/sessions/send-messages.md): Chat with a running agent.
- [Send tool results](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/sessions/tool-results.md): Answer the agent's pending custom tool calls.
- [Pause a session](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/sessions/pause.md): Halt a running session without losing state.
- [Resume a session](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/sessions/resume.md): Continue a paused session.
- [Force an answer](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/sessions/force-answer.md): Ask the agent to emit a final answer on its next step.
- [List sessions](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/sessions/list.md): Browse your sessions with filtering, sorting, and pagination.
- [Retrieve a session](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/sessions/retrieve.md): Get full details of a single session.
- [Get quota](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/sessions/quota.md): Check your concurrent session quota.
- [Session feedback](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/sessions/feedback.md): Submit feedback on a session or individual event.
- [Share a session](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/sessions/share.md): Make a session publicly accessible or revoke access.
- [Get resource](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/sessions/resources.md): Access session-owned resources like screenshots and files.

## Skills

- [Skills](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/skills/overview.md): A skill is a reusable instruction fragment an agent can draw on.
- [Create a skill](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/skills/create.md): Create a reusable skill in your catalog.
- [List skills](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/skills/list.md): Browse your skill catalog.
- [Retrieve a skill](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/skills/retrieve.md): Get the full details of a skill.
- [Update a skill](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/skills/update.md): Edit a skill's content.
- [Delete a skill](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/skills/delete.md): Remove a skill from the catalog.

## Vaults

- [Create a vault](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/vaults/create.md): Register a secrets provider for your organization.
- [List vaults](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/vaults/list.md): Browse your organization's vault configs.
- [Retrieve a vault](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/vaults/retrieve.md): Fetch a vault config by id.
- [Update a vault](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/vaults/update.md): Change a vault config's name or provider settings.
- [Rotate the token](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/vaults/rotate-token.md): Replace a vault's stored service account token.
- [Delete a vault](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/vaults/delete.md): Remove a vault config.
- [Check health](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/vaults/health.md): Probe a vault's provider connection.

## Webhooks

- [Webhooks](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/webhooks/overview.md): Receive signed HTTP notifications when your sessions change status.
- [Create a webhook](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/webhooks/create.md): Register a URL to receive signed event notifications.
- [List webhooks](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/webhooks/list.md): Browse your organization's webhooks.
- [Retrieve a webhook](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/webhooks/retrieve.md): Fetch a single webhook by id.
- [Update a webhook](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/webhooks/update.md): Change a webhook's URL, events, description, or disabled state.
- [Delete a webhook](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/webhooks/delete.md): Remove a webhook.

## Reference

- [Authentication](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/authentication.md): How to authenticate requests to the Computer-Use Agent.
- [Agent authentication](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/agent-authentication.md): Let an agent sign in to the sites and services it works on, without passing secrets through the API.
- [Agent View](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/agent-view.md): Watch a session live or replay it afterward in the H Platform.
- [Errors](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/errors.md): How the Computer-Use Agent reports errors, and what to do about them.
- [Rate limits](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/rate-limits.md): Concurrency limits and how to work within them.
- [Billing](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/billing.md): Understand how usage is metered and how concurrency limits work.
- [Pagination and filtering](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/pagination.md): How to navigate lists of sessions, agents, and skills.
- [What's next](https://hub.hcompany.ai/computer-use-agent/whats-next.md): What's coming next for the Computer-Use Agent.
